hero.headline: Natural Results That Still Look Like You
hero.problem: Too many medspas chase a generic, overdone look — filler stacked on filler, frozen faces, results that scream intervention instead of enhancement.
hero.sub: Lumen is a physician-supervised aesthetics practice where every protocol is customized to your face, your goals, and the way you want to feel when you walk out.

services.name: Neuromodulators
services.description: Botox and Dysport administered by our physician or master injector — precise, subtle, and titrated to your face.

services.name: Dermal Fillers
services.description: Restylane and Juvederm protocols focused on structural support and natural volume, never overfilled.

services.name: Medical-Grade Facials
services.description: HydraFacial, dermaplaning, and chemical peels performed by licensed estheticians with physician oversight.

services.name: Laser & Energy Treatments
services.description: Morpheus8, BBL, and laser resurfacing for skin tone, texture, and tightening — all FDA-approved devices.

services.name: Skin Consultations
services.description: A 45-minute medical skin assessment with a custom protocol you can follow at home or with us.

guide.headline: We Know You're Skeptical — Good
guide.empathy: If you've done the research, you already know most medspas are run by cosmetologists, not physicians. You've seen the before-and-afters that look worse than before. You don't want a discount Groupon for your face — you want to know who's actually holding the needle.
guide.authority: Lumen is directed by Dr. Elena Park, a board-certified physician with 12 years of aesthetics experience and over 15,000 procedures performed. Every injector on our team is licensed, insured, and trained in Dr. Park's conservative, face-first protocol. We turn away clients we don't think we can help.
guide.body: We built Lumen because we were tired of watching friends come home from medspas looking puffy, frozen, or just wrong. Our rule is simple: if you can tell someone had work done, the work was too much. We'd rather you leave your first appointment with less than you asked for and come back in four weeks for more than overdo it today.

plan.headline: A Practice That Works Like Medicine Should

steps.title: Book a Consultation
steps.description: A 45-minute in-person visit with Dr. Park or a senior injector. We assess your skin, listen to your goals, and tell you honestly what we think.

steps.title: Your Customized Protocol
steps.description: No package deals, no upsells. You leave with a written protocol — treatment plan, timeline, and total cost — that's built around your face, not our inventory.

steps.title: Results You Can See (and Your Friends Can't)
steps.description: Treatments are sequenced conservatively over 2-4 visits. You'll see progress without anyone asking what you had done.

stakes.headline: Your Face Is Not a Discount Item
stakes.body: Discount medspas and mobile injectors cause thousands of vascular occlusions, infections, and botched outcomes every year — many of them irreversible. When it comes to your face, the cheapest option is almost always the most expensive one.

successOutcomes.headline: What Lumen Clients Experience
outcomes: Results that look like a well-rested version of you
A physician who will tell you no when the answer is no
Transparent pricing with no package pressure
Confidence in every needle, laser, and product used on your skin
A long-term protocol that ages with you

testimonials.quote: Dr. Park talked me out of filler I thought I wanted and did a tiny amount of Botox instead. It's the best my face has looked in a decade.
testimonials.author: Jennifer L.

testimonials.quote: I've been to four medspas in the Valley. Lumen is the only one where I felt like I was in a doctor's office, not a retail store.
testimonials.author: Amanda S.

contact.address: 7135 E Camelback Rd, Suite 245, Scottsdale, AZ 85251

seo.title: Lumen Aesthetics — Scottsdale Physician-Led Medspa
seo.description: Physician-supervised medspa in Scottsdale offering Botox, filler, lasers, and medical facials with conservative, natural-results protocols.
